step_rationale: Platelet-specific secreted protein; released during activation.
mechanism: SCUBE1 is a soluble protein released from platelet α-granules during activation, serving as a marker of platelet secretion and thrombotic state initiation.

references.title: Biomarkers of in vivo platelet activation in coronary artery disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis: communication from the SSC of the ISTH.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
